markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review account health, focusing on flagged and underperforming clients.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Hyper Exponential:** A high-maintenance client (line-edits, scope creep) is requesting PSEO. This presents an opportunity to pivot to a scalable strategy, bypassing their approval bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [**Biologica:** The Jan 29 renewal is at risk. High-touch content requires excessive legal/medical review, consuming \~50% of a writer's time. A new long-tail strategy could lower delivery costs.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [**Sentinel One:** Editorial work is blocked by client topic selectivity and unreliable keyword tools. The large volume of programmatic CVE pages provides a contractual buffer.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [**New Process:** Directors will now submit formal renewal recommendations 90 days out, outlining the account's state and a clear "renew/don't renew" decision with rationale.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)

## Topics

### Hyper Exponential (Flagged)

  - [**Problem:** High-maintenance client with frequent scope changes and excessive line-editing on drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [**New Request:** Client is fixated on PSEO, likely influenced by a past GrowthX case study (Ramp).](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [**Opportunity:** Pivot to a scalable PSEO strategy to bypass editorial approval bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [**Viable Niche:** Actuarial insurance topics have low competition (SERPs show PDFs) and high intent-match.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [**Scalable Format:** A "topic + line of business" template could generate 50+ pages from one approved format.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [**Action:** Jakub will scope a formal PSEO strategy proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

### Biologica (Renewal Risk)

  - [**Problem:** High-touch content requires extensive legal and medical review, consuming \~50% of a writer's time.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [**Renewal:** Jan 29. The account is not auto-renewing.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** A new long-tail strategy focused on glossary and informational content.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This content avoids specific medical claims, bypassing the high-cost review process.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
      - [**Status:** The client is aware of and interested in this lower-touch approach.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [**Decision:** The team will evaluate if the account is worth retaining. The discussion will frame the choice as keeping Biologica vs. replacing it with a more profitable, lower-effort client.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)

### Sentinel One (Low Performer)

  - [**Problem:** Editorial work is blocked by client topic selectivity and unreliable keyword tools (SEMrush, Ahrefs).](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [**Mitigation:** The large volume of programmatic CVE pages (1,000+ launched) fulfills contractual obligations and provides a buffer.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** Kyle coached the team on engaging the client to understand their strategic priorities and proposing content refresh projects.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Transition:** The account is transitioning from Katya to Bailey and Yana. The change is driven by scheduling (calls were at 7 AM for Katya), not performance.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)

### Interwell (Low Performer)

  - [**Problem:** Organic traffic has fallen for weeks due to client-side errors (e.g., incorrect redirects).](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [**Client Pressure:** Akina (client POC) reports "pressure from above" to resolve issues.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [**Status:** The team is working overtime to fix the redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [**Renewal:** March 3. A reset conversation is needed in January to align on the next three months.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)

### New Renewal Process

  - [**Goal:** Formalize renewal decisions to proactively manage account health and profitability.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [**Process:** Directors will submit a formal recommendation 90 days before renewal, outlining:](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
      - [Account state](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
      - [Recommendation (renew/don't renew)](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
      - [Rationale and terms](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jakub:** Scope and ticket a PSEO strategy proposal for Hyper Exponential.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [**Matthew:** Confirm Biologica's new site launch date.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [**Andi:** File renewal recommendation tickets for Biologica and Interwell.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [**All Directors:** Begin submitting formal renewal recommendations 90 days out.](https://fathom.video/share/Kpxa3Yere-LfGMzFobwh8kPJjMnGgdbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
